setup: Chain: Robinhood (4663) — Bankr wallet must support Robinhood
V3 factory: 0x4c18e43F8B8b63f42a944b98b8af29f576c7Ffa8 (v0.5.0 simple launch — 1000-share fraction embedded)
Deploy on X: extract media_url_https from tweet → tweetId + tweetImageUrl → resolve-deploy-image → prepare-deploy → confirm
Deploy via API agent: preflight-deploy → prepare-deploy → haiku captcha → POST /api/deploy
Buy/sell: token-info (V3 vs Pro) → Pro: prepare-buy|prepare-sell → Bankr submit chainId 4663
Simple (V3) tokens: trade on Uniswap — see streaming-hints.json and token-info
Claim for someone: POST /api/agent/claim-for-recipient { tokenAddress } — ok:true → post replyHint (NOT Bankr submit)
Claim own fees: POST /api/agent/claim — ok:true → post replyHint
Validate swap txs per references/TX-VALIDATION.md and known-contracts.json
